title: Snowplow Event
description: Schema for Snowplow behavioral event data collected via trackers and enriched by the Snowplow pipeline. Represents an enriched event with all standard fields.

app_id.description: Application ID that triggered the event

platform.description: Platform the event was triggered on

collector_tstamp.description: Timestamp when the event was received by the Snowplow Collector

dvce_created_tstamp.description: Timestamp when the event was created on the device

dvce_sent_tstamp.description: Timestamp when the event was sent by the tracker

derived_tstamp.description: Calculated timestamp accounting for clock skew between device and collector

user_id.description: Unique ID set by the application's business logic

network_userid.description: Third-party cookie or fingerprint-based user identifier

session_index.description: Session sequence number for the user

page_url.description: URL of the page where the event occurred

page_title.description: Title of the page where the event occurred

geo_country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code from IP geolocation

ip_address.description: IP address of the event sender

unstruct_event.description: Self-describing event payload with schema reference and data

contexts.description: Array of self-describing context entities attached to the event

enrichments.description: Enrichment data added during pipeline processing
